# Mini-book fixture

## Meta
type: book
lang: en

## Vision
Synthetic 3-chapter fixture used by `prose-loop` smoke tests. Topic: principles of paper folding (origami). The content is intentionally generic — written to give the evaluator something to score without exposing any real manuscript.

## Guidelines
Voice should be terse, declarative, occasionally aphoristic. Sentences vary in length. Avoid clichés. Reader is an intelligent non-specialist.
